parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(lower(trim($1)), '')::text AS email,
    NULLIF(trim($8), '')::text AS first_name,
    NULLIF(trim($9), '')::text AS last_name,
    NULLIF(regexp_replace(trim($10), '\D', '', 'g'), '')::text AS phone_digits,
    $7::jsonb AS raw
),
by_email AS (
  SELECT me.member_id, 100 AS score, 'email' AS match_method
  FROM public.member_emails me
  JOIN input i ON i.email IS NOT NULL
  WHERE me.email_normalized = i.email

  UNION ALL

  SELECT m.member_id, 95 AS score, 'members.email' AS match_method
  FROM public.members m
  JOIN input i ON i.email IS NOT NULL
  WHERE lower(btrim(m.email)) = i.email
),
by_phone AS (
  SELECT mp.member_id, 85 AS score, 'phone' AS match_method
  FROM public.member_phones mp
  JOIN input i ON i.phone_digits IS NOT NULL
  WHERE mp.phone_normalized = i.phone_digits

  UNION ALL

  SELECT m.member_id, 80 AS score, 'members.phone' AS match_method
  FROM public.members m
  JOIN input i ON i.phone_digits IS NOT NULL
  WHERE regexp_replace(coalesce(m.phone, ''), '\D', '', 'g') = i.phone_digits
),
candidate AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM by_email
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM by_phone
  ) x
  ORDER BY score DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
ins AS (
  INSERT INTO public.donations (
    member_id,
    provider,
    provider_reference,
    amount_cents,
    currency,
    donated_at,
    notes,
    status
  )
  SELECT
    (SELECT member_id FROM candidate),
    'givebutter',
    $2,
    $3,
    COALESCE($4, 'USD'),
    CASE WHEN $5 IS NULL OR $5 = '' THEN NULL ELSE $5::timestamptz END,
    $6,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM candidate) THEN 'verified'
      ELSE 'pending_review'
    END
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM public.donations d
    WHERE d.provider = 'givebutter'
      AND d.provider_reference = $2
  )
  RETURNING donation_id, member_id, status
),
add_email AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_emails (member_id, email, source, notes)
  SELECT ins.member_id, i.email, 'givebutter', 'Added from matched Givebutter donation'
  FROM ins
  CROSS JOIN input i
  WHERE ins.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.email IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (email_normalized) DO NOTHING
),
add_phone AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_phones (member_id, phone, source, notes)
  SELECT ins.member_id, $10, 'givebutter', 'Added from matched Givebutter donation'
  FROM ins
  CROSS JOIN input i
  WHERE ins.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.phone_digits IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (phone_normalized) DO NOTHING
),
add_address AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_addresses (
    member_id,
    address_1,
    address_2,
    city,
    state,
    postal_code,
    country,
    source,
    notes
  )
  SELECT
    ins.member_id,
    NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,address_1}', ''),
    NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,address_2}', ''),
    NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,city}', ''),
    NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,state}', ''),
    NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,zipcode}', ''),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,country}', ''), 'USA'),
    'givebutter',
    'Added from matched Givebutter donation'
  FROM ins
  CROSS JOIN input
  WHERE ins.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(input.raw #>> '{data,address,address_1}', '') IS NOT NULL
),
audit AS (
  INSERT INTO public.audit_log (actor, action, entity_type, entity_id, details)
  SELECT
    'givebutter',
    CASE WHEN ins.member_id IS NULL THEN 'donation.pending_review' ELSE 'donation.verified' END,
    'donation',
    ins.donation_id::text,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'raw', $7::jsonb,
      'matched_member_id', ins.member_id,
      'match_method', (SELECT match_method FROM candidate),
      'match_score', (SELECT score FROM candidate),
      'email', (SELECT email FROM input),
      'phone_digits', (SELECT phone_digits FROM input)
    )
  FROM ins
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT donation_id, member_id, status
FROM ins;
